x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Tested VA topics produce reliable Now Assist experiences. Untested topics create broken self-service that damages AI adoption.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Test all published VA topics via the VA Test Simulation console before Now Assist enablement. Document and fix any broken flows. Target: 20+ published topics with evidence of recent maintenance (updated within 90 days).
